heading: Omitted
label: 1321, 1322 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1321 and 1322 were omitted as not of general application, and as covered by the Canal Zone Code. The Canal Zone Code was subsequently redesignated the Panama Canal Code by , and repealed by .Pub. L. 96–70, § 3303(b)Pub. L. 104–201, § 3549Section 1321, acts , ; , , related to passage of persons through the Canal Zone.Aug. 21, 1916, ch. 371, § 1039 Stat. 529June 19, 1934, ch. 667, § 148 Stat. 1122Section 1322, acts , ; , , related to injury to Canal and appurtenances.Aug. 21, 1916, ch. 371, § 1039 Stat. 529June 19, 1934, ch. 667, § 148 Stat. 1122
